description: Prevents context amnesia in Claude Code Dynamic Workflows. Every workflow step anchored to an external cryptographic timestamp — survives context compression. O(1) SHA-3 eventId lookup (2⁻²⁵⁶ collision probability). Causal DAG via prevEventId chains. Also: MEV ordering proofs, MiFIR Art.22c audit-grade timestamps. IETF draft-helmprotocol-tttps-00.
